message:
feat(chrome): add WebSocket-only CDP mode with extension support

- Add initFromWebSocket() to CdpClient for WebSocket-only communication
- Switch from pipe mode to WebSocket mode to enable extensions in headless
- Add screencast frame handling to WebSocketCdpClient with FramePool
- Create embedded termweb extension for viewport resize and page events
- Add extension.zig to extract embedded extension files at runtime
- Handle picker requests from File System Access API polyfill
- Fix dialog.zig term.Exited field access (union requires switch)
- Remove --no-profile flag, default to fresh profile (no cloning)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "manifest_version": 3,
+  "name": "Termweb Bridge",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Bridge extension for termweb browser rendering",
+  "permissions": ["clipboardRead", "clipboardWrite"],
+  "host_permissions": ["<all_urls>"],
+  "content_scripts": [{
+    "matches": ["<all_urls>"],
+    "js": ["content.js"],
+    "run_at": "document_start",
+    "all_frames": true
+  }],
+  "web_accessible_resources": [{
+    "resources": ["termweb-bridge.js"],
+    "matches": ["<all_urls>"]
+  }]
+}
